reviews.review_description: Latest update brings this awesome game a step closer to those of us with a smaller game space. (1.4x2.5) Room mapping has been improved so I didn’t need to move furniture around and the vertical sleep chamber is far more comfortable than lying on the floor. Looking forward to the finished game, devs are doing great so far.
Jaw dropping. This is one of those things you genuinely wish more people could get to experience. Really hoping for completion.

Had to move my settee so I could have a look at this demo. Thought it was ace…..i played lone echo years ago and this had the same feeling. Really felt like I was stood on a mountain top. Really beats the cartoon kiddie games there seems to be a lot of.

Gutted when the demo finished.

Well done and good luck.

I loved the demo so much I'd love to see lots more. However I found the hand tracking to be extremely problematic, it kept dropping out and I had I lot of trouble in changing different settings in an effort to try to keep hand tracking active. No matter what I tried hand tracking just kept dropping out.

developer_response.body: Glad you liked  the experience and want to see more but what a bummer that you hit hand tracking problems. Not ideal. Hand tracking is a Meta Hardware feature and sometimes it is the light conditions (like flickering lights) and it could also be a device issue (a bug) that a restart solves. I'd like to help out and understand the problem better. Would you mind joining the discord https://discord.gg/d2aGYk7xQg or sending me an email at mauro.starfall@gmail.com to discuss? Understanding room and light conditions may help me prepare the app for others that have similar issues. Thanks a lot!

reviews.review_description: I love when an app takes immersion and interaction to the next level. Just with this short demo I found myself giggling and experiencing the “wow factor” multiple times. I look forward to a full version.
This blew me away so much I can't stop checking my meta app to see if it's been released so I can buy it. Please please Dev's get this released cos I can't stand waiting anymore !!!

This is my greatest vr experience so far after having a VR system for a week and I've been VR-ing a lot since I bought it. Simple controls and just beautiful graphics. Instant buy when released. Keep it up guys!

Promising Demo. Very pretty to look at but needs a goal for the player and some trimming. I didn't know why I was collecting stuff on the planet so that was the weakest part and went on too long, with the least impressive visuals. Then it got me to lie down (impressive), but it should have ended the demo there... instead it kept me wondering what I was waiting for quite some time... until end of demo. Anyway, one of the more impressive versions of putting a portal in mixed reality. Worth checking out.

the graphics are better the majority of games. Narritive is very good and funny in the right moments. Well worth the experience. The 57year your sleep is a little long tho. I enjoyed the overall experience.Must buy

reviews.review_title: Very promising demo with awesome VFX
reviews.review_description: This game has the coolest, most immersive portal effect I've seen in my life as both a VR gamer and developer, and the mixed reality is top-tier - turning your walls into the window of a spaceship. There's obviously a lot of innovation going on behind the scenes, and I'm very keen to see where it goes from here!

reviews.review_title: One of the most promising demos of MR
reviews.review_description: I was caught off guard by how good this demo is. It was the first time I felt the magic that VR brought me originally when I tried First Contact, Robo Recall and later, Half Life Alyx. The level of interaction and polish is amazing and I couldn’t believe it when I learned that this was a solo dev making this!  Here’s hoping she/he continues and develops this into a full game or experience.

Starfall immediately transported me. The atmosphere, the mystery, and the promise of a profound story.
A powerful beginning for a universe that seems ready to surprise and welcome us in the most beautiful way possible. Starfall (Chapter 1) left me speechless. From the moment I wake up in space, the atmosphere is mysterious and immersive. The particle effects are memorable.
The environments are at once strange, captivating, and magnificent.
The surreal planets, the subtle lighting, the music—all contribute to the feeling that we're about to experience a powerful emotion.
The game uses VR/MR intelligently: the boundaries between the real and virtual worlds blur, and we feel the fragility of memory, the quest for self.
The beginning of the narrative then slowly unfolds. We want more!
The hand tracking is well integrated, which increases the immersion.
The transition between space scenes and the narration is seamless.
As a bonus, the MR/VR transition through a magnificent space door offers us an intense emotion.
If development continues with this level of ambition and more content, Starfall could become a narrative benchmark in VR/MR. Hats off to Wave Engines for this inspired launch!

We just tried this demo. It has potential! everything works just well. Maybe there could be some improvement for taking in that energy with your hands, because it's pretty difficult and need practice to make it into ball, i hope you get what i mean. But it is so beautiful, there could be some more different actions with hands of course, i just LOVED how we can make portal it gives a vibe of dr strange  which is amazing!! Maybe sleeping time takes a bit too long and i started questioning if it's the end of demo or i should still wait haha, but it's really beautiful and can contain more colorful stars or dots however you call them!  Just hoping that this game wouldn't be overpriced.

reviews.review_title: Superb! Can’t wait for the full content.
reviews.review_description: We need more top tier experiences like this on Quest 3. Awesome use of mixed reality. Fantastic hand tracking. Beautiful visuals and music. Plus a first for me, lying on my back and enjoying a mesmerising visual dance of light at the end of the demo. A must download.

I will give it four out of five stars because I got a little motion sickness.  I would prefer not to have to lie down, as the area that works for me is my porch, and that's rain and leaves in my hair.  

Additionally, it should tell you when starting that you need Hand and Body Tracking enabled for this to work.   

Once you get it running correctly, it is Superb.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the feedback! Glad you enjoyed the experience.

The latest version now has an option to not lie down on the floor thanks to what you pointed out and the store description also mentions hand tracking as a requirement.

A setting for the level of movement to prevent motion sickness is coming soon.

 Thank you for helping me improve it. :) Cheers!

reviews.review_title: A Must-Play Sci-Fi Experience on Quest 3
reviews.review_description: Starfall is a stunning mixed reality experience that turns your room into a spaceship window and takes you on a mesmerizing sci-fi journey. The visuals, music, and hand tracking are top-tier, with one of the coolest portal effects I’ve ever seen in VR. Chapter 1 is short but powerful, leaving me excited for the full story. A must-download for Quest 3 and 3s owners who want to see the future of immersive storytelling.

Very impressive so far! Loved the lying down part, not had a game do that before so cool to have something new. Really impressed with the visuals especially for standalone. I installed the demo a while a go and had a very brief go so today when I had time to play right through I found myself trying to remember if this was standalone or a steam game off of my PC as I remember the graphics being so good.

OK, first of all I’m giving this five stars because this is why people buy VR.  I’m comparing this to all the other VR stuff I’ve played on the quest three and to me. This is literally by far the best.  

I know it’s just a demo, but it’s a pretty intense demo and if this had one more planet to explore and maybe a little bit more about the machinery, I would’ve actually paid to play this for a couple more levels even one more level. It would’ve been worth three or four bucks easy maybe five it’s that good to me. 

I hope this comes out soon. I don’t wanna wait. 

Also wait for the listen to the ships computer at the end. Trust me, do it. ￼
Looking forward to see what this shapes into. If you are fan of sci fi, this is a no-brainer. What VR was created for.

This is one of the best experiences from the entire store. A great little demo that offers more immersion than some paid titles. I hope the developer will finish this, then it's a 100% buy for me. Great work, really really great.

Great graphics and the mixed ar is great!
Haven’t been this blown away by a vr game since Batman Arkham shadow, and it’s only a demo. Can’t wait to see where this goes

developer_response.body: Wow, very kind of you and super happy you enjoy the demo this much. You'll love what will happen next :)

reviews.review_title: Great vibe! Takes you into another world
reviews.review_description: I look forward to buying StarFall when it is finished. I want to see more!

Its definitely a cool experience with some impressive visuals. Its only chapter one of a work in progress, so I definitely want to see more of it. I hope it gets finished. I definitely want to see more of the story.
Amazing experience. Dont miss out.

It is an excellent journey through space. Transforms your room in a spaceship and makes you feel you are in surreal places. 
Can’t wait for the next chapter!

developer_response.body: Thank you for leaving the first review! :) You rock!

reviews.review_title: Short but absolutely worth a look
reviews.review_description: I have over 300 apps, this is an incredible mixed reality experience - i hope it stays free and the solo developer creates more at this quality. Great demo of hand tracking and mixed reality and a highly polished experience that reminds me of the sci fi story 'the yellow pill' because they refer to the real world you see as the simulation and you're adjusting to waking up from it. You do have to lay down on the floor at the very end of the demo to go into the sleep pod but the dream sequence is worth it (or you could just stop there). Great work!
This is an amazing start, and just like everyone else, I look forward to seeing where you take it, I will definitely be purchasing this when it becomes available. Bravo!
A sublime vr experience, great graphics, great immersion, well done all round

reviews.review_title: Stunning example of what VR could be
reviews.review_description: This is a truly impressive dilsplay of what can be done with Mixed Reality and hand tracking. I look forward to seeing where it goes next.
Good luck with development, this demo was amazing
Please do continue development. I am enthralled with it thus far.
